posts.title: Imagine being a working class family that just spent 30 years paying off a mortgage for a small one bed, one bath in Astoria and then you pass away and your kids are taxed 50% of the value because they’re deemed “rich” and they’re forced to liquidate the property.

quotedTweet.content:
NEWS: Zohran Mamdani is proposing big changes to New York’s estate tax:

- Tax rate: increase top tax rate to 50% (from 16%) 
- Threshold: lower to $750K (from $7M)

Mamdani is currently facing a $5.4B city budget deficit so this is one way he’s trying to close the gap.
